theScene: As you continue trekking up the mountain, the ground eventually starts to level out. With a start, you realize you must have reached the top of the mountain! You look around and see the tip of the temple dungeon peeking out above the crest of a nearby peak!
music/Mountain/Purple Planet Music - Energy - Salsa Nites (2_13) 120bpm.mp3

As you excitedly hurry on and move around a rocky outcrop, you can see the entryway to the temple grounds just ahead, but a dancing feminine figure silhouetted in moonlight stands between you and the entrance.

As you excitedly hurry on and move around a rocky outcrop, you can see the entryway to the temple grounds just ahead, but a dancing feminine figure silhouetted in sunlight stands between you and the entrance.

She doesn't seem to notice you as she flows through sensual move after sensual move, her hips swaying to unheard music as her jewelry jingles softly with each nimble step and her hands move in intricate motions that draw your eyes all over her toned body.
As the sun sets past a ridge of the mountain you finally see the dancing woman in better clarity.
music/Mountain/Purple Planet Music - Chilled - Desert Winds (3_12).mp3
She notices your presence mid movement and stumbles to a halt, almost falling flat on her face before she gracefully recovers and turns towards you with a sheepish grin.
Uhm, hey! You're here to enter the temple dungeon, right?
Great! I'm an adventurer like you! My name's Nara! What's yours?
I'm [ThePlayerName], it's nice to meet you.
It's proving very difficult to not stare at her scantily clad body as she wiggles her hips in joy.
I bet you had an arduous journey on your way up here, because I know I did! But now that we've both managed to get up here, we're best friends now!
And I guess we're also a little bit closer to beating the Demon Queen too... but the temple is really hard, so I'm staying out here to practice my dancing first!
She seems rather serious for a moment before returning to a cheerful demeanor.
You wouldn't mind watching me dance for a bit would you? I really feel like I could use some critiquing from a friend!
She gestures over to a rather comfortable looking chair in the stone clearing you didn't notice until she pointed it out.
I should finish climbing the mountain first.

As you continue trekking up the mountain, the ground eventually starts to level out. With a start, you realize you must have reached the top of the mountain! You look around and see the tip of the temple dungeon peeking out above the crest of a nearby peak!
music/Mountain/Purple Planet Music - Energy - Salsa Nites (2_13) 120bpm.mp3

As you excitedly hurry on and move around a rocky outcrop, you can see the entryway to the temple grounds just ahead, but a dancing feminine figure silhouetted in moonlight stands between you and the entrance.

As you excitedly hurry on and move around a rocky outcrop, you can see the entryway to the temple grounds just ahead, but a dancing feminine figure silhouetted in sunlight stands between you and the entrance.

She doesn't seem to notice you as she flows through sensual move after sensual move, her hips swaying to unheard music as her jewelry jingles softly with each nimble step and her hands move in intricate motions that draw your eyes all over her toned body.
As the sun sets past a ridge of the mountain you finally see the familiar dancing woman in better clarity.
music/Mountain/Purple Planet Music - Chilled - Desert Winds (3_12).mp3
She notices your presence mid movement and stumbles to a halt, almost falling flat on her face before she gracefully recovers and turns towards you with a sheepish grin on her face.
Uhm, hey [ThePlayerName]! Fancy seeing you here again, right?
She giggles nervously as you glare at her a bit.
Here to help me practice my dance again?
She gestures over to a rather comfortable looking chair in the stone clearing.
I should finish climbing the mountain first.

As you continue trekking up the mountain, the ground eventually starts to level out. With a start, you realize you must have reached the top of the mountain! You look around and see the tip of the temple dungeon peeking out above the crest of a nearby peak!
music/Mountain/Purple Planet Music - Energy - Salsa Nites (2_13) 120bpm.mp3

As you excitedly hurry on and move around a rocky outcrop, you can see the entryway to the temple grounds just ahead, but a dancing feminine figure silhouetted in moonlight stands between you and the entrance.

As you excitedly hurry on and move around a rocky outcrop, you can see the entryway to the temple grounds just ahead, but a dancing feminine figure silhouetted in sunlight stands between you and the entrance.

She doesn't seem to notice you as she flows through sensual move after sensual move, her hips swaying to unheard music as her jewelry jingles softly with each nimble step and her hands move in intricate motions that draw your eyes all over her toned body.
As the sun sets past a ridge of the mountain you finally see the familiar dancing woman in better clarity.
music/Mountain/Purple Planet Music - Chilled - Desert Winds (3_12).mp3
She notices your presence mid movement and stumbles to a halt, almost falling flat on her face before she gracefully recovers and turns towards you with a sheepish grin.
Uhm, hey [ThePlayerName]! Fancy seeing you here again, right?
She giggles as you glare at her a bit.
Here to watch me dance? I'm sure you don't really want to get by me.
She gestures over to a rather comfortable looking chair in the stone clearing.
I should finish climbing the mountain first.
Can I just pay you to let me by?
Hey... If you're practicing by yourself, why do you have a chair up here..? And how did you manage to even get it up here in the first place?
Uhm... F-For breaks! And I carried it the whole way! 'Cause there {i}definitely{/i} isn't a checkpoint right after here that I used to get here with it!
She's starting to look a bit nervous...
I should finish climbing the mountain first.
That sounded kind of forced... And isn't it kind of odd you're waiting here right before the temple?
Uhm ah... That is... Uh... Ghosts.
She seems to be sweating nervously and fidgeting.
I should finish climbing the mountain first.
You glare at her with suspicion for a while and her resolve crumbles like a sandcastle hit with a tornado.
Ahhhh! Okay, okay I admit it! I'm here to stop you from getting to the temple...
Vivian gave me the quest! The pay was good and I really do need the practice, the next dungeon is actually really tough!
Do you know how hard it is to beat a monster girl by dancing?!
Exactly! So that's why once I beat that dungeon I'm going to get them to teach me some of their cool captivation moves!
music/Mountain/Purple Planet Music - Chilled - Desert Winds (3_12).mp3
Her eyes sparkle with determination and joy as she goes on her tangent, seemingly forgetting that you caught her out on her scheme.
Well, I'm just going to go on by.
Can I just pay you to let me by?

EventText.NameOfScene: Can I just pay you to let me by?
theScene: music/Mountain/Purple Planet Music - Chilled - Desert Winds (3_12).mp3
She blinks before glaring at you with a strangely fierce rage.
NO! I refuse to let you by! Do you know how hard it was for me to beat the golem they used to station here?!
Then they fired her due to complaints! We were such good friends and I haven't seen her since!
She ran away, swearing to become prettier... So for her sake, I can't just let you by!
She seems to take a moment to calm down.
Yes! Sorry. I kind of went off there on you... But no, I won't take any bribes, sorry!
I guess I can watch you dance...
She claps her hands together joyfully and does a small giddy dance.
You go and sit down in the cushy chair and Nara lets out a seductive giggle.

EventText.NameOfScene: I should finish climbing the mountain first.
theScene: Nara scrunches up her face in disappointment a bit before giving you a seductive look.
Pink barriers appear at the entrance and exit of the clearing!
Sorry, but I'm going to have to {i}make{/i} you watch my dance!♥

EventText.NameOfScene: Well, I'm just going to go on by.
theScene: You start walking towards the temple, but a pink barrier suddenly appears in front of the path, cutting you off!
Where do you think you're going?♥
Nara gives you a grin as a pink barrier suddenly appears behind her, cutting off the exit!
Well, if that's how it has to be.♥ Get ready for a show!♥
Having triumphed over the dancer Nara, the pink barriers disappear and you continue on to the temple!
